svg.title: API Gateway Architecture Diagram (corrected)
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing API Gateway with middleware chain, rate limiter returning allow:false, gateway sending 429 to client, host-based routing, circuit breakers, and observability endpoints.
svg.text: Rate Limiter returns { allow: false } → Gateway decides to send 429 back to client (not the rate limiter itself)
⚡ Circuit breaker on each backend proxy — opens on 5 consecutive 5xx responses
